headline: 3 Market-Beating Stocks to Research Further
summary: Stocks that outperform the market usually share key traits such as rising sales, expanding margins, and increasing returns on capital. The select few that can do all three for many years are often the ones that make you life-changing money.

headline: GE Aerospace vs. Textron: Which Aerospace & Defense Stock Should You Bet On?
summary: GE outpaces TXT with stronger growth, rising estimates and major engine wins, despite trading at a higher valuation multiple.

headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks with Promising Prospects and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.

headline: Is General Electric (GE) Fairly Priced After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are trying to work out whether General Electric's current share price reflects its underlying worth, the recent moves in the stock give you plenty to think about. At a last close of US$291.61, the stock has seen a 4.9% decline over 7 days, a 10.8% decline over 30 days, and a 9.1% decline year to date, after a 43.8% return over the past year and a very large gain over 5 years. These returns have kept General Electric in focus as investors weigh how the business fits into long term...

headline: The Only 3 Growth ETFs I Would Buy and Hold Through Any Market
summary: Growth investing has had a choppy start to 2026. The major growth benchmarks are down in the low single digits year-to-date, and some of the biggest names in tech have pulled back meaningfully from their late-2025 highs. For investors with a multi-year horizon, that kind of consolidation is worth understanding in the context of each ... The Only 3 Growth ETFs I Would Buy and Hold Through Any Market
